categories.name: Payment methods
categories.description: Ways a customer can complete a payment in each commerce channel.

capabilities.name: UPI
capabilities.description: UPI collect, intent, QR, and related India payment flows.

storeOS.note: QR scan only — intent, collect, and autopay flows are not available in Store OS.

capabilities.name: Cards
capabilities.description: Credit and debit card payments across available processors.

agenticCheckout.note: Via payment link redirect — embedded card entry is not available in Agentic checkout.

capabilities.name: Net banking
capabilities.description: Bank redirect payments for online checkout.

capabilities.name: Wallets
capabilities.description: Digital wallets supported by the online payment gateway.

capabilities.name: Cash on delivery
capabilities.description: Pay at delivery for eligible orders and serviceable destinations.

capabilities.name: COD surcharge
capabilities.description: Additional fee controls for cash-on-delivery orders.

capabilities.name: EMI / Pay later
capabilities.description: Instalment and deferred-payment options exposed by gateways.

capabilities.name: Cash
capabilities.description: Cash collection at the physical store counter.

capabilities.name: International payments
capabilities.description: Payments from cards or instruments issued outside India.

storefront.note: Gateway-gated — availability depends on configured payment gateway and merchant enablement.

capabilities.name: Split tender
capabilities.description: Combine more than one tender type for a single store payment.

categories.name: Checkout experience
categories.description: Features that shape payment collection before the transaction is complete.

capabilities.name: Checkout extensions
capabilities.description: Custom checkout fields and rules that can influence payment behavior.

agenticCheckout.note: COD availability field only — full extensions not supported

capabilities.name: Saved instruments
capabilities.description: Saved payment methods for faster repeat online checkout.

capabilities.name: Payment links
capabilities.description: Generate a secure payment URL and send it to the customer.

capabilities.name: Customer verification
capabilities.description: Attach or verify customer identity before payment completion.

storeOS.note: Counter staff can attach customer details, but online checkout identity flows are not used.

categories.name: Post-payment operations
categories.description: Capabilities available after a payment has been captured.

capabilities.name: Refunds
capabilities.description: Create and track refunds for successful payments.

agenticCheckout.note: Payment-link payments can be refunded through Razorpay; conversational refund management is not built yet.

capabilities.name: Webhooks
capabilities.description: Internal event delivery for payment and refund lifecycle updates.

capabilities.name: Settlement reports
capabilities.description: Internal settlement and reconciliation reporting.

categories.name: Payment gateways
categories.description: Gateway integrations available in each channel.

capabilities.name: Razorpay
capabilities.description: Primary gateway for online, POS card, and payment-link flows.

capabilities.name: Juspay
capabilities.description: Online payment gateway option for storefront checkout.

capabilities.name: PayU
capabilities.description: Online payment gateway option for storefront checkout.

capabilities.name: Custom gateway
capabilities.description: Merchant-specific gateway integrations for online checkout.
